input.tenant_message: My AC keeps turning on and off every few minutes — it runs for maybe 3 or 4 minutes, shuts off, then turns back on again. The apartment never really gets cool because it doesn't run long enough. I've noticed this started after I changed the thermostat setting last week. My electric bill this month is already looking high.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule an HVAC technician to assess the short-cycling issue — likely causes include an oversized system, low refrigerant, a dirty evaporator coil, or a faulty thermostat setting causing rapid setpoint swings. Check that the thermostat anticipator setting is correct. Short-cycling increases wear and energy cost; resolve within 3-5 days.
